title: Wooden Truck with Christmas Tree Height 6 cm Length 7 cm Width 3.5 cm Pack of 1
description: More detailed small wooden truck that you can decorate and hang. The truck with the Christmas tree on the roof is a classic wooden ornament, but our wooden figurine is something very special - since it is made of wood, you can give it the look you want, whether colourful, festive or natural. If you want to paint or draw on it, you can use our Plus Color craft paints and Plus Color fabric crayons that cover very well. The best thing about our mini truck is that you can decorate it to match your Christmas theme:. - Paint the wooden figure with plus colour craft paint and then fill in the fine details with a plus colour marker. - Decorate the wooden figure with patterns or write something on it with a burning pen - The wooden figure is particularly festive by adding some glitter to the wet colour.
